backend/main.mo: Motoko actor with a single public function deduplicateComicText that filters duplicate text lines from an input array using a Set, trapping on empty input.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files describing a Spider-Verse comic viewer with comic-book styling, i18n support, speech recognition, narration, PDF export, and progressive rendering features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using oklch color space, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title "Spider-Verse Comic Viewer - Into the Spider-Verse" and a root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component wrapping the app with providers (QueryClient, Theme, Preferences, ComicSettings, ErrorBoundary) and rendering Header, Footer, CharactersGallery, controls, narration/listening sections, and ComicViewer.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary component that catches render errors and displays a comic-styled recovery UI with error details and reset/reload buttons.
frontend/src/components/CharactersGaller: Component rendering a responsive grid of character portraits from CHARACTERS data with hover effects and error fallback handling.
frontend/src/components/ComicPanel.tsx: Reusable container component for comic panels with border styling, shadow effects, animation, and support for default/highlight/credits variants.
frontend/src/components/ComicParts.tsx: Presentational components for comic elements including CaptionBox, SpeechBubble, ThoughtBubble, SfxText, and SceneLabel with comic-appropriate styling and overlay support.
frontend/src/components/ComicViewer.tsx: Main comic viewer component with progressive rendering, chapter structure, deduplication support, timeline mode, missing asset warnings, and rendering of story and credits panels with localization.
Button component that exports the comic to PDF, localizing chapters and panels based on user preferences (language, author name, timeline mode) and showing loading state during export.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, attribution to caffeine.ai with referral link, and credits for Spider-Verse IP ownership.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component with comic title, subtitle, language selector, and theme toggle button (light/dark mode).
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown selector component for choosing the application language from available options, integrated with app preferences context.
frontend/src/components/RepetitionRemova: Toggle switch component that enables/disables repetition removal in comic narration, using comic settings context.
frontend/src/components/StoryListeningCo: Speech recognition control component with start/stop buttons, status badges, and callbacks for transcript updates and errors.
frontend/src/components/StoryNarrationCo: Audio narration control with voice selection dropdowns for different characters (Miles, Jefferson, default), playback controls (play/pause/stop), and narration script generation based on localized comic panels.
Panel displaying speech recognition transcript with word count, copy-to-clipboard, and clear functionality, showing both final and interim transcripts.
frontend/src/components/VerifiedPanelIma: Image component with error handling that falls back to a placeholder image on load failure and reports errors via callback.
frontend/src/contexts/AppPreferencesCont: React context providing global app preferences (language, author name, timeline mode) with localStorage persistence and BCP-47 language tag validation.
frontend/src/contexts/ComicSettingsConte: React context managing comic-specific settings, currently only repetition removal toggle state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor for backend communication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useI18n.ts: Hook providing localized translation function (t) that uses current language from app preferences context.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissingIllustratio: Hook that tracks and reports missing illustration assets by collecting filenames of failed image loads with a 100-item cap for memory safety.
Hook for progressive rendering of comic panels in batches to avoid performance issues, with configurable initial count and increment size.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for deduplicating comic text lines via the backend actor with automatic cache invalidation.
Hook wrapping the Web Speech Recognition API for continuous voice transcription with interim results, error handling, and browser compatibility detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesisVoi: Hook that loads and tracks available browser text-to-speech voices, handling asynchronous voice loading via the voiceschanged event.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoryNarration.ts: Hook for narrating story scripts using Web Speech API with per-speaker voice selection, playback controls (play/pause/stop), and configurable rate/pitch.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with comic book-themed design tokens (aged paper, bold colors, sharp edges), custom typography classes, and comic-specific components like speech bubbles and caption boxes.
frontend/src/lib/characters.ts: Character definitions for Spider-Verse characters with IDs, names, and artwork asset paths for Miles, Gwen, Peter variants, villains, and supporting cast.
frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts: Defines structured comic data for Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse with 500+ panels organized into chapters, including sample translations and helper functions for panel illustrations.
frontend/src/lib/comicLocalization.ts: Provides functions to localize comic panels, parts, and chapters by resolving translated text with English fallback based on language tags.
frontend/src/lib/comicModel.ts: Defines TypeScript types and interfaces for comic panels (story/credits), panel parts (caption, dialogue, thought, sfx, scene), chapters, and utility functions for text extraction and flattening.
frontend/src/lib/deduplication.ts: Provides utilities to deduplicate text lines and panel parts across comic panels, removing repeated content while preserving structure and counting total lines.
frontend/src/lib/i18n.ts: Implements internationalization with language normalization, translation function with variable substitution, and support for English, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, and Chinese locales.
frontend/src/lib/locales/de.ts: German translation dictionary containing UI strings for header, narration controls, listening mode, transcript, controls, stats, author, language, timeline, viewer, footer, and PDF export.
frontend/src/lib/locales/en.ts: English translation dictionary (base locale) containing all UI strings for the comic viewer application including header, narration, listening, controls, and export features.
frontend/src/lib/locales/es.ts: Spanish translation dictionary containing UI strings for all application features including narration controls, listening mode, transcript management, and PDF export functionality.
frontend/src/lib/locales/fr.ts: French translation dictionary exporting all UI strings for the Spider-Verse comic viewer, including narration controls, listening mode, PDF export, and footer credits.
frontend/src/lib/locales/ja.ts: Japanese translation dictionary exporting all UI strings for the Spider-Verse comic viewer with the same structure as the French locale.
frontend/src/lib/locales/zh.ts: Chinese translation dictionary exporting all UI strings for the Spider-Verse comic viewer with the same structure as other locales.
frontend/src/lib/narration.ts: Converts comic panels to narration script items with text and optional speaker metadata, applying deduplication when repetition removal is enabled.
frontend/src/lib/pdfExport.ts: Exports comic panels to PDF by generating printable HTML with deduplication, timeline timestamps, chapter organization, and opening a browser print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/timeline.ts: Provides utilities to format timestamps and ranges aligned to the movie's 1h 56m runtime for displaying panel timing information.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name composition.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point setting up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and rendering the root App component.
frontend/src/types/web-speech.d.ts: TypeScript ambient type definitions for the Web Speech API including SpeechRecognition interfaces and event types.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions for colors (using OKLCH), fonts (Bangers display font), comic-style shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking a comic book viewer with 18 missing panels that need to be restored. Contains feature requests to add missing panel images, verify all chapters render without filtering, and ensure progressive rendering displays the complete story.
